description: Facts in reader report narrative not yet in canonical JSON

promoted_facts.fact: Franchise Agreement liquidated damages formula uses $25,000 per room (not $10,000 as stated in Item 6 of FDD)
promoted_facts.note: FA and FDD may differ — FA text uses $25K x rooms for pre-2yr period; FDD Item 6 says $10K x rooms. The FA prevails as binding contract.

promoted_facts.fact: Actual damages (in lieu of liquidated damages) triggered if 7+ Brand FAs terminate within 12 months due to franchisee/affiliate breach
General release on renewal/transfer covers all claims 'without limitation' through Effective Date (Section 16.8)
Monthly Program Fee compliance discount: 0.5% reduction (3.0% vs 3.5%) confirmed in FA Addendum for PE (Spark) brand code
Competitor definition for Spark (PE) is scoped to 'economy hotel market segment' per STR classification
Economic conditions not a defense to breach (Section 16.10)
